name: Barbecue Sauce Xxxj77a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onion and garlic in butter until they are transparent.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the saucepan.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Simmer until your grill is ready, about 10 to 15 minutes, or until you can't stand the wonderful smell of the sauce any longer.
